entries.desc: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.
Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.
Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.
Disintegrate channels 20% faster.
Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.
Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.
Essence regenerates 5% faster.
Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.
Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.
Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.
Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.
You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.
Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.
Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.
Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.
Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.
Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.
Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.
Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.
Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.
Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.
Your Stamina is increased by 6%.
Hover lasts 4 sec longer.
Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.
Your Leech is increased by 2%.
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.
While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.
Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.
Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.
Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.
While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.
Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,535 additional Spellfrost damage to them.
Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.
Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.
Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.
Green spells restore 5% more health.
Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.
Glide speed and height increased by 10%.
Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.
Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Hover gains 1 additional charge.
Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.
Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.
Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.
Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.
Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

Increase all damage dealing allies' primary stat by 8.0% of your own and increase your own damage by 20% for 10 sec.

Ebon Might will split its effect when applied to more than 2 other allies.

Eruption, Deep Breath, and your empower spells extend the duration of these effects.
Cause a violent eruption beneath an enemy's feet, dealing 1,064 Volcanic damage split between them and nearby enemies.
Your Living Flame has a 20% chance, and your Azure Strike has a 15% chance, to make your next Eruption cost no Essence.
Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting and prevent any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 6 sec.
Eruption deals 30% more damage per enemy struck, up to 150%.
Essence Burst stacks 2 times.
When cast at an enemy, Living Flame strikes 1 additional enemy for 100% damage.
Azure Strike deals 15% increased damage and has a 10% chance per target hit to echo, casting again.

Gather earthen power beneath your enemy's feet and send them hurtling upwards, dealing 1,664 Volcanic damage to the target and nearby enemies.

Empowering expands the area of effect.

I:   3 yd radius.

II:  6 yd radius.

III: 9 yd radius.

Fly to the targeted location, exposing a Temporal Wound on enemies in your path for 10 sec.

Removes roots and grants immunity to movement impairing and loss of control effects while flying.

 Temporal Wound
15% of damage dealt by allies affected by Ebon Might is copied as additional Arcane damage to enemies after 10 sec.

Damage is reduced if Ebon Might affects more than 2 other allies.

Fatal attacks are diverted into a nearby timeline, preventing the damage, and your death, in this one.

The release of temporal energy restores 9,889 health to you, and 3,276 to 4 nearby allies, over 9 sec. Healing starts high and declines over the duration.

May only occur once every 6 min.
Essence Burst reduces the cast time of Eruption by 40% and increases its damage by 20%.
Increases your maximum Essence to 6.
Eruption's Essence cost is reduced by 1.
Breath of Eons reduces enemies' movement speed by 70%, and reduces their attack speed by 50%, for 10 sec.
When allies deal damage with Temporal Wounds, they gain a shield for 100% of the damage dealt. Absorption cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Conjure a pair of Weyrnstones, one for your target ally and one for yourself. Only one ally may bear your Weyrnstone at a time.

A Weyrnstone can be activated by the bearer to transport them to the other Weyrnstone's location, if they are within 100 yds.

Enchant an ally to appear out of sync with the normal flow of time, reducing threat they generate by 30% for 1 hour. Less effective on tank-specialized allies. 

May only be placed on one target at a time.
Defy Fate healing increased by 100% and its cooldown is reduced by 1 min.

Protect an ally with 15 explosive dragonscales, increasing their Armor by 20% of your own.

Melee attacks against the target cause 1 scale to explode, dealing 114 Volcanic damage to enemies near them. This damage can only occur every few sec.

Blistering Scales can only be placed on one target at a time. Casts on your enemy's target if they have one.

Learn to attune yourself to the essence of the Black or Bronze Dragonflights:

Black Attunement: You and your 4 nearest allies have 2% increased maximum health.

Bronze Attunement:You and your 4 nearest allies have 10% increased movement speed.

Grant an ally the gift of foresight, increasing their critical strike chance by 3% for 18 sec.

Affects the nearest ally within 25 yds, preferring damage dealers with their cooldowns active, if you do not have an ally targeted.
Upheaval cannot be interrupted, and has an additional 10% chance to critically strike.
Upheaval deals 50% increased damage to the primary target, and launches them higher.
Blistering Scales no longer loses charges and deals 20% more damage.
When cast, Blistering Scales grants the target a shield that absorbs up to 4,560 damage for 30 sec based on their missing health. Lower health targets gain a larger shield.
Consuming Essence Burst grants you 5% Intellect for 6 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.

Obsidian Scales activates Black Attunement, and amplifies it to increase maximum health by 4.0% for 12 sec.

Hover activates Bronze Attunement, and amplifies it to increase movement speed by 25% for 4 sec.
The range of your helpful magics is increased by 5 yards.
Prescience grants the ally a chance for their spells and abilities to echo their damage or healing, dealing 15% of the amount again.
Emerald Blossom increases targets' healing received by 3% for 10 sec.
Each time Blistering Scales explodes it deals 15% more damage for 12 sec, stacking 10 times.
Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1, and they reach maximum empower level 20% faster.
Essence Burst has a 20% chance to not be consumed.
Eruption has a 25% chance to form a mote of diverted essence near you. Allies who comes in contact with the mote gain a random buff from your arsenal.
Prescience has a 35% chance to grant Essence Burst.
Your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Symbiotic Bloom.
Emerald Blossom no longer has a cooldown, deals 35% increased healing, and increases the duration of your active Ebon Might effects by 1 sec, but costs 3 Essence.
Eruption reduces the remaining cooldown of Upheaval by 1.0 sec.
Deep Breath reduces the Essence cost of your next 6 Eruptions by 1.
Surge forward in time, causing your cooldowns to recover 1,000% faster for 2 sec.
Motes of Possibility may now grant Prescience to allies and have a 10% increased chance to activate.
Fire Breath grants the inferno's blessing for 8 sec to you and a nearby ally, giving their damaging attacks and spells a high chance to deal an additional 1,022 Fire damage.
Upheaval causes an aftershock at its location, dealing 30% of its damage 2 additional times.
Deep Breath grants you Fury of the Aspects for 15 sec after you land, without causing Exhaustion.
Time Skip channels for 1 sec longer.
The cooldowns of your spells are reduced by 10%.
Deep Breath casts an Eruption at the first 3 enemies struck. These Eruptions have a 100% chance to create a Mote of Possibility.
Inferno's Blessing's damage is increased by 40%, and your effects that extend Ebon Might also extend Inferno's Blessing.
Breath of Eons summons a version of you from the future to assist you in battle, lasting 20 sec. Your duplicate casts Eruption, Fire Breath, and Upheaval.
